meta.title: The Brick House
meta.description: The Brick House is a monthly panel discussion with GuidePoint Security’s CISO, Gary Brickhouse, and his expert guests examining the hottest topics in cybersecurity. No talking heads here, just honest conversations amongst security practitioners who have current, real-world experience solving the most complex cybersecurity challenges.

paragraphs.text: Tailored consulting, engineering and managed security services to meet your unique needs.
Ensure all software releases are secure

Leverage our expertise and access to hundreds of cybersecurity solutions. We take a vendor-agnostic approach to reviewing, analyzing, comparing and vetting current and emerging technologies that best fit your needs and environment.
Plan, build and run effective federal government cybersecurity programs.
We are your Trusted Advisor
GuidePoint Security LLC 1900 Reston Metro Plaza Suite 701 Reston, VA 20190
info@guidepointsecurity.com (877) 889-0132
Review educational cybersecurity content

headings.text: Security Without Walls — Identity’s Expanding Role in Cyber Defense
Agentic AI — Preparing for AI That Takes Action
The Brick House: The Security Horizon — 2026 Cyber Trends
The Brick House: State-of-the-Art SOC (Modernize, Optimize, Repeat)
The Brick House: Preparing for the Worst — Incident Response Planning
CISO Partner Exclusive: Strengthening Cyber Resilience in the AI-World

paragraphs.text: As cloud, SaaS and machine identities expand, the traditional perimeter no longer defines security. Join CISO Gary Brickhouse and GuidePoint identity leaders for a live virtual roundtable on how identity has become the primary control layer in modern cyber defense.
AI is moving into systems that can take action on their own. Join our live talk for a Brick House discussion on how security, risk and identity teams can prepare for agentic AI in the enterprise.

Discover the key cybersecurity trends shaping the market with a revealing discussion on evolving threats, accelerating AI and tech advancements, cloud foundations, Identity innovation, supply chain + SaaS risks… and more! Fortify your cybersecurity strategy for the year ahead.

Watch this special 50th Brick House webinar on-demand for a discussion on how to modernize your SOC to reduce complexity, improve efficiency and deliver better outcomes. Learn how to utilize AI and threat intelligence, add clear and measurable KPIs, align with organizational goals, and more.

Build, review and optimize your incident response plan today. Watch this insightful discussion to gain actionable tactics from GuidePoint Security’s IR experts on building effective incident response strategies that transform potential disasters into manageable situations.

Watch cybersecurity leaders from GuidePoint Security, CrowdStrike, Okta and Zscaler as they explore how organizations can strengthen cyber resilience through unified security in an AI-driven world. Our panel discusses the latest threat trends, the critical role of identity and practical strategies.
Click here to explore all of The Brick House On-Demand episodes!

paragraphs.text: Gary Brickhouse, CISO | LinkedIn

Gary Brickhouse is the CISO at GuidePoint Security. He is accountablefor overseeing the company’s information security program, which includes developing andsupporting the internal security architecture and control practices. In addition to hosting the Brick House series, he frequently speaks on a variety of information security topics at industry events and webinars.
